title: Bitdefender Total Security Shredder Link Following Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
description:
This vulnerability allows local attackers to escalate privileges on affected installations of Bitdefender Total Security. An attacker must first obtain the ability to execute low-privileged code on the target system in order to exploit this vulnerability.
The specific flaw exists within the File Shredder Wizard service. By creating a symbolic link, an attacker can abuse the service to delete a folder. An attacker can leverage this vulnerability to escalate privileges and execute arbitrary code in the context of SYSTEM.
addtionnal_details:
Bitdefender has issued an update to correct this vulnerability. More details can be found at:
https://www.bitdefender.com/support/security-advisories/improper-link-resolution-before-file-access-in-bitdefender-total-security-via-link-following-va-13681/
timeline:
2026-03-13 - Vulnerability reported to vendor
2026-07-23 - Coordinated public release of advisory
2026-07-23  - Advisory Updated
